docket_entries.description: FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED ON MEDIATED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR $2660.00 AT $75.00 A MONTH FOR 35 MONTHS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-15-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, DANNY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-12-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED PER THE COURT ORDER OF JANUARY 11, 2008, TO BE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORTS FOR A TOTAL OF 35 MONTHS. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-06-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT PROVIDES FOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR $2660 AT $75 A MONTH FOR 35 MONTHS COMMENCING APRIL, 2008 AND A 36TH AND FINAL PAYMENT OF $40.00. IF DEFENDANT IN COMPLIANCE, PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR AND COURT WILL CONTINUE FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. IF DEFENDANT NOT IN COMPLIANCE, PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR AND REQUEST ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR BALANCE DUE ON SETTLEMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-11-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PAID IN FULL PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
